infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: North Star uses the camera to capture property photos during on-site inspections. Photos stay on your device until you upload them to a workfile.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: North Star uses the microphone to record voice notes during on-site inspections.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: North Star uses your location to geotag inspection photos so the audit chain can witness where each photo was taken.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: North Star imports photos from your library for inclusion in a workfile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: North Star can save captured inspection photos to your Photos library so you have a local copy with the GPS + timestamp metadata embedded.

plugins.cameraPermission: North Star uses the camera to capture property photos during on-site inspections. Photos stay on your device until you upload them to a workfile.
plugins.microphonePermission: North Star uses the microphone to record voice notes during on-site inspections.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: North Star uses your location to geotag inspection photos so the audit chain can witness where each photo was taken.

plugins.photosPermission: North Star imports photos from your library for inclusion in a workfile.
